calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Greg Groeneveld, Esq. for Appellant Yung Chen, who is also present.
Evelyn Xinfeng Hu and Derek Chang Liu, Respondents
Kevin Brown, Appellant's witness

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.

The following Respondents' exhibits are introduced during the examination/testimony:
Ex. 1 - Invoice - Architecture services dated Oct 29, 2014
Ex. 3 - Photo of residence - front and back views
Ex. 6 - Stairs drawing by Kevin Brown
Ex. 8 - Corrected stairs drawing by HC Structural Engineering Inc.

Respondent's additional exhibits submitted to the court:
Ex. 2 - Califonria Civil Code 5537 - Architect Practice Act
Ex. 4 - Advice, emails and events
Ex. 5 - CA Licensed Contractor's professional opinion
Ex. 7 - Text message - Yung Chen's explanation
Ex. 9 - Status of Yung Chen's over-the-counter permit application
Ex. 10 - Invoice from HC Structural Engineering
Ex. 11 - One month rent paid
Ex. 12 - Daily interest accrued on financing the project

The following Appellant's Exhibits are introduced during the examination/testimony:
Ex. 3 - Drawings prepared by Yung Chen
Ex. 4 - Text messages dated Nov 18, 2014 at 10:35 am
Ex. 5 - SF City Records showing the property is a 2 unit, 2 story buildings
Ex. 8 - December 11 email from Hu to Groeneveld
Ex. 9 - Dept of Building Inspection review of Yung Chen's plans
Ex. 10 - Email re SFPUC Capacity request for plans

Appellant's additional exhibits submitted to the court:
Ex. 1 - Contract Invoice of $4,500 dated 10-29-14
Ex. 2 - Emails from Ms. Hu re. building plans
Ex. 6 - California Civil Code 5537
Ex. 7 - Nov 19 email from Mr. Liu

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Evidence is retained.

Judge Cynthia M. Lee, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (606)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Continued To Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Judgment Entered
